## Schedule {.unnumbered}

**Spring 2026**

## Course schedule

| Week | Date | Topic | Readings / Prep | Due |
|--------------:|---------------|---------------|---------------|---------------|
| 1 | 2026-04-01 | Introduction + course logistics | Syllabus, Lecture 1 | Activity 1 |
| 1 | 2026-04-03 | R basics and plots | [r4ds](https://r4ds.hadley.nz/data-visualize.html) chapter 1, Lecture 2 | Activity 2 |
| 2 | 2026-04-05 | Types of studies | Lecture 3 | Activity 3 |
| 2 | 2026-04-07 | Probability | Lecture 4 | Activity 4 |
